# Summary

What changed and why?

# Validation

- [ ] Tests run or reason stated
- [ ] Rule/source documents checked if rules changed
- [ ] Security scan completed for secrets/tokens

# Agent Handoff

- [ ] `Coordination/HANDOFF.md` updated
- [ ] `Coordination/CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] `Coordination/DECISIONS.md` updated if a decision changed

# Risk Notes

What could be wrong, incomplete, or worth reviewing carefully?
